title: helianthus decapetalus var. multiflorus
intro: Helianthus decapetalus var. multiflorus, also known as the largeflowered sunflower, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Helianthus decapetalus var. multiflorus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
